/cwe/weakness/1090.Name: Method Containing Access of a Member Element from Another Class
/cwe/weakness/1090.Description:
A method for a class performs an operation that directly
					accesses a member element from another class.
/cwe/weakness/1090.ExtendedDescription: This issue suggests poor encapsulation and makes it more difficult to understand and maintain the product, which indirectly affects security by making it more difficult or time-consuming to find and/or fix vulnerabilities. It also might make it easier to introduce vulnerabilities.
